meaning: n.参加一哩赛跑的运动员
examples: Just eight days before, I ran a 50-miler.
It was just a little three-miler, but it was so much fun that I got hooked.
"So, I said to myself: that's it. The mole," Miler said in a 2006 interview with Czech public radio.
The second employee Miler introduces us to has built himself a tiny house on wheels.
The Queen Elizabeth II Stakes at Ascot on Saturday (1615 BST) will crown European's top miler.
